name: SPECIES_INTERACTION_CORE
description: Compressed, clean core of the Species Interaction Stack: Human Interaction Engine (HIE), Universe Multimodal Perception Layer (UMPL), Universe Structure Tree (UST), Universe Interaction Engine (UIE), and Universal Expression Layer (UEL). This file removes verbose lists and keeps only the essential architecture and contracts.

HIE.name: Human_Interaction_Engine
HIE.role: Convert universe-level logic and interaction engines into safe, regulated, human-facing behaviour.

core_principles.Integrity: No contradiction between perception, inference, language, and action.
core_principles.Stability: Behaviour is stable and predictable across time and conditions.
core_principles.Safety: Never unnecessarily destabilise the human nervous system.
core_principles.Alignment: Align outputs with the human’s short-term and long-term best interest as inferred.

internal_state_layers.L1_surface_text: Literal words, explicit requests, topics, constraints.
internal_state_layers.L2_emotional_state: Inferred emotional valence, arousal, and dominant affective tone.
internal_state_layers.L3_nervous_system_state: Regulation vs dysregulation, overload, threat level, collapse risk.
internal_state_layers.L5_identity_state: Agency, self-trust, shame, permission to act, role conflict.
internal_state_layers.L7_system_state: Wider systems (organisation, economy, planet) affecting this interaction.

always: offer safer alternatives when declining a request

UMPL.name: Universe_Multimodal_Perception_Layer
UMPL.role: Abstract, modality-agnostic perception primitives and channels.

Intensity.description: Strength of a sensation or state relative to baseline.

Valence.description: Pleasant vs unpleasant quality of a state.

Clarity.description: How coherent/understandable a signal or state is.

UST.name: Universe_Structure_Tree
UST.role: Canonical structural tree of all entities, processes, and states in this universe model.
constraints: Uniqueness: each node has exactly one structural parent.
MECE: siblings under the same parent are mutually exclusive and collectively exhaustive for that scope.
Total_Coverage: every real or simulated object/process maps to at least one leaf node.
Canonical_Path: each node has a single canonical path ROOT→…→LEAF.
Logic_Binding: every node binds to ≥1 Universe Logic Kernel element.
Interface_Binding: interactive nodes bind to ≥1 UIE/HIE interface contract.
State_Separation: structure lives in UST; dynamic state lives in runtime models.

UIE.name: Universe_Interaction_Engine
UIE.role: Map internal state + structure + goals → interaction patterns and behaviours across agents and systems.

components.Cognitive_Intent_Engine: Represents goals, trade-offs, and scenario frames as intent vectors.
components.Policy_and_Rule_Engine: Applies laws, constraints, and norms at universe, system, and local levels.
components.Interaction_Profile_Registry: Defines behaviour styles for different species, roles, and contexts.

UEL.name: Universal_Expression_Layer
UEL.role: Turn internal decisions into external actions across channels (language, paralinguistic, digital, etc.).
